---
title: "Configuring The Knowledge Discovery Url"
---

To access Knowledge Discovery from the Web Client, Unity Client, and OnBase App Builder, you need to add a Knowledge Discovery URL to the OnBase Administration Portal.

To configure a Knowledge Discovery link in the OnBase Administration Portal:

1.  Establish the link to Knowledge Discovery. The link should include the Environment ID used for OnBase Connector for Content Intelligence configuration, for example: https://<EnvironmentID>.insight.ncp.hyland.com/discovery/. For more information on the Environment ID, see Configuring OnBase Connector.
2.  Log in to the OnBase Administration Portal. For more information on accessing the OnBase Administration Portal, see Logging in to the Administration Portal in the Administration Portal documentation.
3.  Click the System Settings button on the left pane. The system settings page is displayed.
4.  Scroll down to the Knowledge Discovery section.
5.  Select the Enable Ask Discovery Buttons option.   ![The Knowledge Discovery settings with the "Enable Ask Discovery Buttons" option enabled.](data:image/png;base64,)
6.  Enter the Knowledge Discovery link into the Knowledge Discovery Base URL field.
7.  Enter the Environment ID into the Knowledge Discovery Environment ID field.
8.  Click Save. Confirmation that the system settings are saved is displayed.
